title: Phunware Acquires Stake in Campaign Nucleus Subsidiary
text: Phunware Acquires Stake in Campaign Nucleus Subsidiary. Summary: Phunware Inc. (NASDAQ: PHUN) announced it signed a term sheet to acquire a controlling interest in MyCanvass, LLC, a company currently owned by Campaign Nucleus. The transaction involves a mix of cash and Phunware stock having an aggregate value of $1.02 million. Campaign Nucleus is a SaaS platform founded by Brad Parscale, who previously served as Digital Director for Trump's 2016 campaign and Campaign Manager for his 2020 candidacy. Strategic Focus: The partnership aims to develop AI-powered tools for managing canvassing operations and enhancing voter mobilization. CEO Stephen Chen stated the collaboration will reduce inefficiencies, enhance campaign and advocacy effectiveness, and enable real-time, personalized voter outreach. Key Details: MyCanvass provides voter engagement and mobile app solutions. The deal is contingent on executing definitive agreements. Expected completion in the coming days. Intent to expand services within and outside the U.S.
